subject: i9907003 ruling re notice of a full panel hearing

emails.subject: I9907003 Ruling re Notice of a Full Panel Hearing
emails.subject_base: I9907003 Ruling re Notice of a Full Panel Hearing
emails.body: Team, Looks like things are finally coming home to roost here. I would argue that we (TW and Enron) should both consider getting our 5-minute sound bite in here since we're being afforded the opportunity. Obviously, our goal should be to see the Commission adopt the Comprehensive Settlement. Our focus point during our presentation should be on not only the sufficiency of infrastructure (not dealt with specfically in the Comprehensive Settlement) but the idea that there must be a concomitant unbundling of the intrastate transmission and a rational, equitable means to allocate capacity at receipt points and an orderly assignment of firm rights to shippers (primary/secondary). Let's put together a short teleconference to work out our strategy here and make sure we're on the agenda for May 22. Will you guys send me a note back and let me know your availabilty Mon., Tues. or Wed.?

emails.body: Re: I9907003 Ruling re Notice of a Full Panel Hearing I'll be on the call. Hope all's well on your end. Best, Jeff Jeffery Fawcett/ENRON@enronxgate 05/14/2001 09:15 AM
